title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・道なき道の果て

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I won the autumn Tenno Sho! I really beat my two
top oshis!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I never would have made it here if it weren't
for my trainer and all the Umamusume I raced
along the way... Oh, my feelings are out of
control.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can't take much more. I love everyone shooo
mush, I'm losing the vocabulary to describe
it—no, wait! I've got one last thing to say!
